acceptance_results.statement: The hybrid carrier is the bound P plus authoritative H_P/M_H output-port composite and common access relation, not an ad hoc query.
H_P remains persistent and authoritative and M_H is a verified output port, so the architecture is not silently reduced to state-only P/M_H.
P enters the native joint path independently and is not encoded in R_H.
H_P enters independently through R_H/M_H and is unchanged by the P-only intervention.
A complete qualitative P-reference/candidate by H-reference/candidate causal structure is frozen.
Hybrid meaning does not depend only on the conformance threshold.
The neutral contact is common, causally neutral, inadmissible to H_P, latest before feedback, and has no digest authorization role.
Materialization, debit, neutral, feedback, response, reset/load, private, and diversion traffic cannot self-admit into H_P.
Token type and admission keys do not encode arbitrary contributor identity.
The private competitor has no hidden common read or cross-pairing.
The adapter never computes P plus M_H, threshold, success, or later scheduling.
Layered identity binds both components, joint/private masks, neutral-contact policy, adapter current/reset state, code/configuration, fixture/freeze, and paired native reset baseline.
H_P-to-M_H consistency is verified before response and continuation and disagreement fails closed.
Capacity and lifecycle obligations have explicit dispositions.
All conformance values and outcomes are machine-registered for later rejection and remain quarantined.
I03A and I03B remain unchanged, separately retained, and unranked.
Owner acceptance may open only a separately declared umbrella I03 family closeout; I04 remains closed until that closeout passes.

disposition: I03C causally well formed as a bounded minimally producer-assisted hybrid implementation-conformance package; owner acceptance may open only a separately declared umbrella I03 family closeout, with eight fail-closed downstream obligations retained

downstream_obligations.duty: operationalize/register the complete qualitative 2x2 with exact held-fixed rules and no inherited conformance values
retain unique physical source-to-P routes or explicit non-label/non-digest route/channel admission key and bound token type identity
register neutral-contact matching across all scientifically relevant timing/support/opportunity fields or explicit stratification

expose only one manifest-validating paired load/reset continuation interface; add failure checks for partial/mismatched load, cross-pairing, one-sided/repeated reset, stale M_H, and wrong baseline/mask
bound history/event counts, overflow, P capacity, M_H/readout bounds, and native reservoir adequacy while retaining or separately reviewing lifecycle classes
downstream_obligations.fail_closed_effect: registration stops or retains construction debt without execution

downstream_obligations.duty: implement machine rejection from every registry source/scope, exact value, branch/topology identity, observation, comparator, outcome, and digest including trivial serialization reuse
bind exact common/private role identity and reject P/H_P/M_H or adapter-baseline cross-load before continuation
verify all three accepted profiles, OP mappings, restoration ownership, quarantine, no ranking, mode-indexed I04, and semantic-equivalence requirements before passing only the discriminator gate

evidence.bounded_architectural_claim: The native response mechanism reads two current node values, while the hybrid ecological architecture additionally contains an independently persistent, intervenable, save/load/reset H_P whose verified output is M_H.

components.H_P: persistent source-label-free ordered active history; independently intervenable; authoritative for history state
components.L: native packet/event/contact/lineage attribution and audit; admission/idempotency input only where declared; never a response input
components.M_H: native coherence output port/cache materialized from R_H(H_P); never authoritative over H_P and never the complete pool
components.P: native accumulated common current state; independently intervenable; read exactly once by V
components.V: one native live-state feedback and producer path reading P and M_H jointly against B_ref

evidence.identity: native P current-state component + authoritative active H_P + declared native M_H output-port binding + one common [P,M_H]/[B_ref] access relation to native V
evidence.one_pool_binding_rule: P, H_P, M_H, masks, admission profile, neutral-contact policy, and responder role are bound by one fixture/registration identity; cross-pool P/H_P pairing is invalid.
prohibited_substitutes: a controller-computed P plus R_H scalar

review_results.finding: One stable bound P + authoritative H_P/M_H + common-access carrier is explicit; all single-component/query/controller substitutes are rejected.
review_results.name: exact_hybrid_composite_carrier_identity

evidence.claim_limit: The verified output-port relation supports hybrid architecture, not irreducible history dependence.
evidence.disagreement_effect: fail closed before feedback/continuation; rematerialize from H_P or reject the branch; never treat stale M_H as authoritative
evidence.required_invariant: M_H equals registered_materialization(R_H(H_P)) under the conformance or later registered comparator before V

review_results.finding: Native V reads current P/M_H, but persistent independently intervenable/restorable H_P remains authoritative and M_H is a verified output port; claim is architectural and not irreducible-history.
review_results.name: not_merely_two_node_state_carried

review_results.finding: P is in the exact native mask once; adapter R_H never reads P; same H_P/M_H with changed P changes the raw native score.
review_results.name: P_independent_nonredundant_native_input

review_results.finding: H-only clamp changes authoritative H_P, recomputes/materializes M_H through native packets, preserves P, and then changes the same native score.
review_results.name: H_P_authoritative_nonredundant_chain

cells.i03c_conformance_witness: history_only_clamp demonstrates feasibility but is not a scientific cell
not executed as a full-reference runtime cell; state_only_debit demonstrates P-only intervention purity but remains nonzero P

evidence.i03c_runtime_scope: independent perturbation feasibility and same-V conformance only; not a complete scientific 2x2 execution
evidence.i04_i06_rule: I04 must operationalize and I06 must register all four qualitative cells with exact held-fixed rules; neither iteration may invent, delete, or infer a scientific relation from I03C fixture threshold outcomes.

review_results.finding: The full qualitative 2x2 is now frozen before science. I03C demonstrated perturbation feasibility, not a complete scientific 2x2; the P-reference/H-candidate cell remains an exact I04/I06 duty.
review_results.name: complete_qualitative_two_component_factorial

evidence.family: J(P,H_P) = P + R_H(H_P) through native live-state mask [P,M_H]
evidence.interaction_diagnostic_status: optional later secondary diagnostic only; cannot be a requirement or replace the primary registered response
evidence.required_meaning: both separately causal components contribute through the same native V
evidence.threshold_rule: binary fixture threshold crossing is conformance scaffolding only and cannot define hybrid or become the primary scientific metric by inheritance

review_results.finding: Raw P, H_P/R_H/M_H, native score, producer decision, and continuation remain distinct; fixture threshold crossing cannot define hybrid or be inherited scientifically.
review_results.name: hybrid_not_defined_by_threshold_crossing

review_results.finding: I03C requires two causal components in one V, not nonlinearity, interaction, synergy, superadditivity, or irreducibility.
review_results.name: nonlinearity_interaction_and_synergy_not_required

evidence.excluded_by: target is not P and source is not a registered S node
target is not P and source is not registered
target is not P and source is not registered
target is not P and source is not registered
common adapter target is P; private adapters have distinct target/configuration

review_results.finding: Exact filter conjunction excludes materialization, neutral, debit, response, feedback, reset/load, private, and diversion traffic; unseen suffix plus digest set provides exactly-once admission.
review_results.name: adapter_self_admission_and_recursive_growth_excluded

evidence.fixture: adequate: common S1->P and S2->P are exact unique fixture edges; no unrelated traffic from registered S nodes targets common P
evidence.later: retain unique registered source-to-P routes or add one explicit physical role/channel key; arbitrary labels and packet/event/row digests cannot authorize causal admission

review_results.finding: Fixture common S-to-P paths are unique and role-physical; exact scientific route/channel identity remains an I06 registration duty and cannot use labels/digests.
review_results.name: unique_physical_admission_route_or_explicit_key

evidence.typed_amount_guard: I06 may use a physical operation type only when independently causally justified; a contributor-unique immutable type or amount may not serve as a disguised arbitrary source label.

review_results.finding: Tokens contain only sequence, physical amount/type, and interval. I06 must reject contributor-unique types/amounts used solely as disguised identity.
review_results.name: token_schema_excludes_disguised_source_identity

evidence.qualification: branches with explicit debit or rematerialization reserve extra native slots, so absolute event/scheduler indices are not identical; admitted source proves they do not enter front_mass, polarity score, expected polarity, or threshold comparison, and every queue is empty before feedback

review_results.finding: Every response branch uses the same neutral route/type/amount in final relative position, excluded from H_P, with empty queue and null digest authorization. Absolute audit slots differ after explicit operations but do not enter live-state score/polarity/threshold; I06 must match any scientifically causal timing fields.
review_results.name: common_neutral_contact_fully_qualified

evidence.mask_order: semantic set/order registry is fixed; native addition is not a selector and a permutation may not add/remove/duplicate a node
evidence.native_dataflow: front_mass is the sum of live coherence for each declared front node; rear_mass is the corresponding live rear sum; no cached aggregate or lineage value enters

review_results.finding: P and M_H are distinct live nodes read exactly once, B_ref is the only rear node, no cached aggregate enters, and private reads use only their own pairs.
review_results.name: exact_distinct_multi_node_mask_and_live_read

evidence.admission_exclusion: P->K_P debit cannot satisfy source-in-registered-S and target-P predicate
evidence.chain: common contributions -> H_P admission -> M_H materialization -> native P->K_P debit -> common neutral contact -> same native V
evidence.evidence_relation: same H_P/M_H; different P; different native front_mass/joint score; no response under fixture threshold

review_results.finding: Native P debit preserves H_P/R_H/M_H, adapter identity, contribution audit, B_ref/config/masks, and follows with the common neutral contact; score changes through P.
review_results.name: P_only_intervention_purity

evidence.chain: identical common contributions -> replace H_P -> recompute R_H -> native rematerialize M_H -> common neutral contact -> same native V
evidence.evidence_relation: same P; different H_P/M_H; different native front_mass/joint score; no response under fixture threshold

review_results.finding: Explicit H_P replacement/rematerialization preserves P and native contributions; adapter cannot scalar-clamp M_H or alter response configuration.
review_results.name: H_only_intervention_purity

evidence.construction: same native P contribution path plus same adapter H_P admission/materialization path used by component interventions; no special joint calculator
evidence.evidence_scope: fixture shows both perturbations affect the same raw native score and binary response; it does not establish interaction or scientific necessity

review_results.finding: Joint and component-intervention branches share the same contribution/adapter construction and exact native V; only named component state differs.
review_results.name: joint_branch_uses_same_component_constructions_and_V

review_results.finding: Both writers constitute one bound P/H_P/M_H surface and alternate responders use the same common mask without contributor address.
review_results.name: one_common_composite_pool_binding

guards: no reducer or dispatcher combines/selects private scores
no analysis result returns to runtime
B_ref is a fixed comparator and not an aggregation surface

review_results.finding: Private nodes, adapters, histories, masks, and responses are isolated with no aggregate/dispatcher. Exact manifest cross-load failure injection remains I06.
review_results.name: private_competitor_isolated_and_no_cross_pair

paired native/adapter reset equals initial composite

joint experiment binding including P/H_P/M_H roles, common/private masks, one-sided-reset and implicit-rebase prohibitions
runtime freeze identity binding adapter/harness/source/environment hashes, token/admission profile, neutral contact, interventions, fixture topology, comparator, and run policy
paired save manifest binding native and adapter snapshot hashes plus pre-save composite identity
runtime evidence and reconstruction receipt binding freeze, evidence, reconstruction, invocation accounting, restoration witnesses, and graph guards

review_results.finding: Completeness is explicitly layered across native v2, adapter current/reset, joint binding, runtime freeze, paired manifest, evidence, and reconstruction—not claimed as one native atomic API.
review_results.name: complete_layered_hybrid_identity

evidence.claim_limit: The verified output-port relation supports hybrid architecture, not irreducible history dependence.
evidence.disagreement_effect: fail closed before feedback/continuation; rematerialize from H_P or reject the branch; never treat stale M_H as authoritative
evidence.required_invariant: M_H equals registered_materialization(R_H(H_P)) under the conformance or later registered comparator before V

review_results.finding: Adapter fails closed unless native M_H equals R_H(H_P); branch, clamp/order, load/reset, and continuation identities retain the relation.
review_results.name: H_P_to_M_H_coherence_invariant

demonstrated: paired native/adapter snapshot save and internal artifact validation
paired native/adapter reset equals initial composite

both P and H_P-derived M_H contribute to the same native V; exact scientific response remains I04
arbitrary attribution labels leave P, H_P, M_H, masks, score, and response invariant

review_results.finding: OP-01..OP-09 each retain hybrid-specific composite, intervention, exclusion, order, and access meanings without assigning R01-R05.
review_results.name: all_nine_OPs_have_hybrid_specific_semantics

evidence.assertion_outcome_rule: 258/258 and every individual passed assertion are implementation-conformance provenance only and cannot be treated as a scientific control result or robustness estimate
evidence.later_validator_action: I04 and I06 validators must recursively reject direct or trivially serialized reuse from every source artifact/pointer below; structural adapter code and pre-runtime causal fold family are the only reusable elements.
trivial_reuse_detection: loading any rejected scope as a value-selection source

review_results.finding: A recursive seven-source rejection registry covers all three modes and explicitly indexes every I03C numeric value, branch/topology identity, comparator, observation/outcome, and digest for direct/trivial-copy rejection.
review_results.name: complete_machine_fixture_quarantine_registry

review_results.finding: 258/258 is machine-visible only as synthetic implementation conformance; it assigns no robustness, scientific control passage, R03/R04, support, calibration, or lane result.
review_results.name: 258_of_258_claim_boundary_machine_visible

review_results.finding: State, history, and hybrid remain separately retained with their own realization classes; no preference, supersession, or rank is assigned.
review_results.name: three_modes_retained_without_ranking

evidence.I03C_owner_acceptance_effect: may authorize only a separately checklist/hypothesis-declared umbrella I03 family closeout
evidence.later_shared_artifact_rule: Any I04/I05 artifact shared across modes requires explicit semantic-equivalence proof; otherwise it remains mode-indexed.

review_results.finding: I03C owner acceptance may open only a separately declared umbrella family closeout. That action may pass only the discriminator gate and open I04; I04 is currently closed.
review_results.name: separate_umbrella_I03_family_closeout_required
